title: Add And Remove One Element
goal: Add one Delete button, remove it, and stop there.
instruction: Add one element, remove the new Delete button, and stop when it is gone.
review_notes: Exercises a two-step state change where the second control appears only after the first action.

steps.explanation: I added one element, so a Delete button should now be available.
I removed the added element, so the Delete button should disappear.

action.summary: I added one element, removed it, and stopped after the Delete button disappeared.

steps.explanation: The added element is gone now, so I am ending the task.
